title: 2016 HABITS
content:
2016 HABITS

Contact one blogger a day, just spark conversation
Write and read once a day
Produce/jam once a day
Music theory
Language
Release a remix/track a month
One mix a month
One piece of music theory a week
Keep updating fans via mailing list, keep sending them content and tidbits, handwritten letters

Finish tracks in their entirety (vocals and all)
Create a max patch looper that allows for control over multiple loops
Multi headphone output

Make a comprehensive list of all characters in meta and what they turn into

Figure out my weekly hours in total
Plan a weekly schedule

Print image board / and sign reading : what are you great full for?

LIMIT social media to twice a day
Get out of debt
Weights
Led lights
Hdd
Image board
Gratitude poster
Print food pages and hang them in cabinets
